summary: Marathi & Bengali regional language editions — pilot
description:
Roll out Marathi edition to a 10% audience starting August 2026, followed by Bengali ~6 weeks later. Includes localised section names, push notifications in target language, and an in-app language picker on first launch.

NRI users (London, Dubai, Singapore) make up ~18% of regional-language requests; the editions ship globally via the app stores.
